width.$description: Focus ring thickness — references core interaction primitive.

offset.$description: Distance between focused element and ring.

color.$description: Default focus ring color — theme-aware semantic border-focus (neutral blue). Intent-bearing surfaces should use focus.ring.intent.<intent> so the ring matches the control's intent instead of the generic blue.

danger.$description: Focus ring color for destructive/danger and invalid controls — matches the danger border so a focused destructive button or invalid field reads red, not the generic blue focus ring.

style.$description: Focus ring stroke style. Constant across themes.
